title: List Mastery
description: Combine all list operations to build a complete harvest management system.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: You've learned all the list operations. Now let's combine them into a complete harvest management system!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: It will track every harvest, calculate totals, manage a processing queue, and provide analytics. Everything a smart farmer needs!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: First, let's build a harvest queue. Create an empty list, harvest 3 wheat, and append each to the queue.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So each harvest goes into the queue to be processed later?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This is how real systems manage tasks. Build it!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Perfect! Your queue is ready. Now let's process some items.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Now use pop() to process items from your queue. Check the length before and after to see the queue shrinking!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: I'll pop items one by one and track the queue size!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Excellent! You're processing data from a queue. Now let's add analytics!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Create a complete analytics system: build a harvest list, calculate the total with sum(), and get the average!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: I'll create a full dashboard with all the farming stats!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Harvest 4 wheat, track them, and give me total yield, count, and average per harvest!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Impressive! Your analytics system is professional-grade. Ready for the ultimate challenge?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Final challenge: Harvest 7 wheat, build a tracking list, pop the first 2 to process them, then calculate stats on the remaining 5!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: That combines everything: append, pop, sum, and length!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! Show me you're a true list master. Track, process, and analyze - all in one workflow!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: OUTSTANDING! You've mastered lists completely! You can now manage data collections like a professional programmer!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I feel so powerful! Lists make everything so much easier!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: You've unlocked one of programming's most fundamental concepts. With lists, you can build amazing automated systems!
